{{Infobox group
| name = Handmaiden of the Dead Mother
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Handmaidens]] of the [[Dead Mother]] are attendants that all [[Children of Nakothi]] aspire to be.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Handmaidens]] of the [[Dead Mother]] possess a cruel intelligence and often served as overseers or managers supervising the [[Dead Mother]]'s harvests.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Looking into the face of a [[Handmaiden]] can drive one insane.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
